sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Celebrating with Food
sentences.arabic: الاحتفال بالطعام
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Celebrating with Food.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: People around the world celebrate special events with food.
sentences.arabic: الناس حول العالم يحتفلون بالمناسبات الخاصة بالطعام
sentences.audio: assets/audio/People around the world celebrate special events with food.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: People around the world
sentences.arabic: الناس حول العالم
sentences.audio: assets/audio/People around the world.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: celebrate special events with food.
sentences.arabic: الاحتفال بالمناسبات الخاصة بالطعام.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/celebrate special events with food.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: People enjoy special food at weddings, on holidays, and on birthdays.
sentences.arabic: يستمتع الناس بالطعام الخاص في حفلات الزفاف، وفي العطلات، وفي أعياد الميلاد.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/People enjoy special food at weddings, on holidays, and on birthdays.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: People enjoy special food at weddings
sentences.arabic: يستمتع الناس بالطعام المميز في حفلات الزفاف
sentences.audio: assets/audio/People enjoy special food at weddings.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: on holidays, and on birthdays
sentences.arabic: في العطلات، وفي أعياد الميلاد
sentences.audio: assets/audio/on holidays, and on birthdays.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Some people also celebrate food with festivals.
sentences.arabic: بعض الناس يحتفلون بالطعام أيضًا من خلال المهرجانات
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Some people also celebrate food with festivals.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: These festivals are usually once a year.
sentences.arabic: عادة ما تكون هذه المهرجانات مرة واحدة في السنة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/These festivals are usually once a year.mp3

sentences.english: They can be fun and unusual, but they are always delicious.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They can be fun and unusual, but they are always delicious.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They can be fun and unusual
sentences.arabic: يمكن أن تكون ممتعة وغير معتادة
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They can be fun and unusual.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: but they are always delicious.
sentences.arabic: لكنها دائمًا لذيذة
sentences.audio: assets/audio/but they are always delicious.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The Gilroy Garlic Festival in Gilroy, California, is in July.
sentences.arabic: مهرجان ثوم جيلروي في جيلروي، كاليفورنيا، يكون في يوليو.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The Gilroy Garlic Festival in Gilroy, California, is in July.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: It is a very big event.
sentences.arabic: إنه حدث كبير جدًا.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/It is a very big event.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Gilroy grows a lot of garlic.
sentences.arabic: جيلروي يزرع الكثير من الثوم.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Gilroy grows a lot of garlic.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Every year over 4,000 people make food for over 100,000 visitors
sentences.arabic: كل سنة، أكثر من ٤٠٠٠ شخص يحضرون الطعام لأكثر من ١٠٠٬٠٠٠ زائر.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Every year over 4,000 people make food for over 100,000 visitors.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Every year
sentences.arabic: كل سنة
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Every year.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: over 100,000 visitors
sentences.arabic: أكثر من 100,000 زائر
sentences.audio: assets/audio/over 4,000 people make food.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: for over 100,000 visitors
sentences.arabic: لأكثر من 100,000 زائر
sentences.audio: assets/audio/for over 100,000 visitors.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Cooks prepare many different dishes with garlic
sentences.arabic: الطهاة يحضرون العديد من الأطباق المختلفة بالثوم.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Cooks prepare many different dishes with garlic.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: You can even buy garlic popcorn and garlic ice cream.
sentences.arabic: يمكنك حتى شراء فشار بالثوم وآيس كريم بالثوم.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/You can even buy garlic popcorn and garlic ice cream.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The International White Truffle Fair is in October in Alba, Italy.
sentences.arabic: معرض الكمأ الأبيض الدولي يكون في أكتوبر في ألبا، إيطاليا.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The International White Truffle Fair is in October in Alba, Italy.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Truffles are delicious with pasta or rice.
sentences.arabic: الكمأ لذيذ مع المعكرونة أو الأرز.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Truffles are delicious with pasta or rice.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They are very expensive.
sentences.arabic: هم غاليين جدًا.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They are very expensive.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: In fact, they sometimes cost $3,000 per pound.
sentences.arabic: في الواقع، أحيانًا تكلف ٣٠٠٠ دولار للرطل.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/In fact, they sometimes cost $3,000 per pound.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: In fact
sentences.arabic: في الواقع.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/In fact.mp3

sentences.english: they sometimes cost
sentences.arabic: أحيانًا تكلف
sentences.audio: assets/audio/they sometimes cost.mp3

sentences.english: $3,000 per pound.
sentences.arabic: ٣٠٠٠ دولار للرطل

sentences.english: 0.45 kilograms
sentences.arabic: ٠.٤٥ كيلوغرام
sentences.audio: assets/audio/0.45 kilograms.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The Baltic Herring Festival in Helsinki, Finland, is over 270 years old.
sentences.arabic: مهرجان الرنكة البلطيقية في هلسنكي، فنلندا، يعود عمره لأكثر من 270 سنة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The Baltic Herring Festival in Helsinki, Finland, is over 270 years old.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The festival celebrates a popular fish, the herring.
sentences.arabic: يحتفل المهرجان بسمكة شعبية، وهي الرنجة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The festival celebrates a popular fish, the herring.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: For one week in October, fishermen sell fried herring, herring soup, herring sandwiches, and herring pizza.
sentences.arabic: لمدة أسبوع واحد في أكتوبر، يبيع الصيادون الرنجة المقلية، وحساء الرنجة، وسندويشات الرنجة، وبيتزا الرنجة
sentences.audio: assets/audio/For one week in October, fishermen sell fried herring, herring soup, herring sandwiches, and herring pizza.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: For one week in October
sentences.arabic: لمدة أسبوع واحد في أكتوبر
sentences.audio: assets/audio/For one week in October.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: fishermen sell fried herring, herring soup
sentences.arabic: يبيع الصيادون الرنجة المقلية، وحساء الرنجة
sentences.audio: assets/audio/fishermen sell fried herring, herring soup.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: herring soup, herring sandwiches, and herring pizza.
sentences.arabic: لمدة أسبوع واحد في أكتوبر، يبيع الصيادون الرنجة المقلية، وحساء الرنجة، وسندويشات الرنجة، وبيتزا الرنجة
sentences.audio: assets/audio/herring sandwiches, and herring pizza.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: You can buy fresh herring, too, and make your own dish.
sentences.arabic: يمكنك شراء الرنجة الطازجة أيضًا وصنع طبقك الخاص.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/You can buy fresh herring, too, and make your own dish.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: You can also buy handmade gifts and warm winter clothes.
sentences.arabic: يمكنك أيضًا شراء هدايا يدوية وملابس شتوية دافئة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/You can also buy handmade gifts and warm winter clothes.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: At special times in Saudi Arabia, people celebrate by eating kuzi, or cooked lamb.
sentences.arabic: في أوقات خاصة في المملكة العربية السعودية، يحتفل الناس بتناول الكوزي أو لحم الضأن المطبوخ.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/At special times in Saudi Arabia, people celebrate by eating kuzi, or cooked lamb.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They usually eat it on large trays set on colorful carpets.
sentences.arabic: هم عادة يأكلونه على صوانٍ كبيرة موضوعة على سُجّاد ملون.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They usually eat it on large trays set on colorful carpets.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They usually eat it on large trays

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: set on colorful carpets.
sentences.arabic: موضوعة على سُجّاد ملون
sentences.audio: assets/audio/set on colorful carpets.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Inside the lamb are chicken, rice, nuts, and onions.
sentences.arabic: داخل الحمل هناك دجاج وأرز ومكسرات وبصل.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Inside the lamb are chicken, rice, nuts, and onions.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Inside the lamb

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: People often eat eggs and green salad with the meat.
sentences.arabic: غالبًا ما يأكل الناس البيض والسلطة الخضراء مع اللحم.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/People often eat eggs and green salad with the meat.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: During Eid, people enjoy al badiya after morning prayers.
sentences.arabic: أثناء العيد، يستمتع الناس بالبادية بعد صلاة الصبح.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/During Eid, people enjoy al badiya after morning prayers.mp3

sentences.english: This is a meat and rice dish with soup, onions, and other vegetables.

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The food smells wonderful.
sentences.arabic: الطعام رائحته رائعة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The food smells wonderful.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: At this time of year, people share food with others to show their kindness..
sentences.arabic: في هذا الوقت من السنة، يشارك الناس الطعام مع الآخرين ليظهروا لطفهم.
